test.create_query: CREATE TABLE classification_10m (SearchPhrase String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY SearchPhrase
CREATE TABLE classification_500k (SearchPhrase String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY SearchPhrase
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO classification_10m SELECT SearchPhrase FROM hits_100m_single WHERE cityHash64(WatchID) % 10 = 0 SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 1
INSERT INTO classification_500k SELECT SearchPhrase FROM hits_100m_single WHERE cityHash64(WatchID) % 200 = 0 SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 1
test.query: SELECT detectLanguage(SearchPhrase) FROM classification_10m FORMAT Null
SELECT detectLanguageMixed(SearchPhrase) FROM classification_10m FORMAT Null
SELECT detectTonality(SearchPhrase) FROM hits_100m_single FORMAT Null
SELECT detectLanguageUnknown(SearchPhrase) FROM classification_500k FORMAT Null
SELECT detectCharset(SearchPhrase) FROM classification_500k FORMAT Null
